subcodes.first_line: O Thou Lord Who nurturest Thy servants! Guide the father of this loving one unto the highest Paradise, and forgive his sins and transgressions
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند بنده پرور پدر این مهرپرور را ببهشت برین رهبر شو و از گناه و خطا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
